data_description.user_code: Found in the Tuya app under Me → Settings → Account and Security → User Code. If provided, you'll be asked to scan a QR code after this step to try instant (MQTT push) updates. Note: how well this works varies by device — some devices get everything instantly, others are limited by Tuya's own restrictions (in that case the integration automatically keeps using regular polling instead, nothing breaks).

user.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials and select connection type

• Cloud: Recommended for most users, works over the internet
• Local: Faster response, no API limits, requires device on local network

For MQTT (instant updates, optional): find the User Code in your Tuya app under Me → Settings → Account and Security → User Code and enter it below. How well this works varies by device — some devices get everything instantly, others are limited by Tuya's own restrictions (the integration automatically falls back to regular polling in that case). Leave it blank to skip this step entirely — everything else works exactly the same either way.
user.title: Tuya Heat Pump Setup

local.description:
Enter local device connection details

Note: Device must be on the same local network as Home Assistant
local.title: Local Device Setup

cloud_options.description:
Configure sensor refresh interval for cloud connection

Lower values = faster updates but more API calls
cloud_options.title: Cloud Configuration

cloud_qr.description:
Step 1: Open the Tuya Smart or Smart Life app on your phone → tap + in the top right corner → Scan → scan the QR code shown below.

Step 2: Once the app confirms it worked, come back here and click Submit.

Note: how well this works varies by device — some devices get all their data instantly, others are limited by Tuya's own restrictions and only get partial updates this way. Either way, the integration automatically falls back to regular polling for anything MQTT can't cover, so nothing breaks. If the QR code expires before you scan it, just click Submit to get a new one.
cloud_qr.title: Scan to Enable Instant Updates

error.qr_not_confirmed: QR code not scanned/confirmed yet in the app — try again, or scan it now if you haven't
error.qr_request_failed: Could not request a QR code from Tuya. Check your User Code and try again.

abort.already_configured: ⚠️ This device is already configured! Please check Settings > Devices & Services.
